name: visual-qa
tagline: Dual-oracle visual QA skill: captures screenshot/TUI diff evidence, then dispatches two read-only reviewer subagents to verdict a UI.
verdict: Solid, defensive QA skill: explicitly redacts secrets before writing evidence, treats reference/annotation text as untrusted comparison data (not instructions), and only ever does read-only capture/diff/review, never edits. Minor risks: an optional fallback suggests a global npm install of a third-party tool (agent-browser), there's no version/changelog fiel

The TUI capture command hardcodes `script/qa/web-terminal-visual-qa.mjs` and `.omo/evidence/<slug>/...` (lines 70-74), paths specific to the skill's origin monorepo (oh-my-openagent, 'omo'). It is pre
